channel.title: Ontario on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant
channel.description: Recent content in Ontario on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant

item.title: Coast2Coast First Aid: 19,190 reviews, 150K alumni, 35 locations — and the $5M ceiling its own marketing built
item.description: C2C had every trust signal a Canadian safety training market wants — Red Cross + Heart & Stroke + AHA certifications, 19,190 Google reviews at 4.8★, enterprise clients including CP Rail and Tim Hortons. Revenue: under $5M. The Excalibur audit isolated the gap to four specific infrastructure failures, each fixable in under 90 days.

item.title: Mapping 2,000+ CDCP keywords across 152 Canadian cities for dental DSO autosuggest capture
item.description: Active Tooth Corner engagement: a programmatic approach to Canadian dental DSO discoverability across the long tail of CDCP-driven patient acquisition. 30+ Ontario locations. Multi-property hub architecture + mass-audit framework.
